name: Ghost Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ゴースト・フュージョン
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using only Zombie monsters you control as material. If your LP are lower than your opponent's, you can also banish up to 1 Zombie monster from your hand, Deck, or GY as material. You can only activate 1 "Ghost Fusion" per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using only Zombie monsters you control as material. If your LP are lower than your opponent's, you can also banish up to 1 Zombie monster from your hand, Deck, or GY as material. You can only activate 1 "Ghost Fusion" per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Deck as Fusion Materials
Can only use certain Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
